◆ CALLSITE_DELEGATE_GETTER

#define CALLSITE_DELEGATE_GETTER ( METHOD)
Value:
InstrTy *II = getInstruction(); \
return isCall() \
? cast<CallInst>(II)->METHOD \
: cast<InvokeInst>(II)->METHOD

#define CALLSITE_DELEGATE_SETTER ( METHOD)

if (isCall()) \
cast<CallInst>(II)->METHOD; \
else \
